args.command:
command -v chattr >/dev/null || echo 'chattr_missing'; chattr +i /usr/sbin/hping3 && (lsattr /usr/sbin/hping3 || true); sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /root/hping3.sha256; printf '#!/bin/sh
sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /tmp/hping3.current
cmp -s /tmp/hping3.current /root/hping3.sha256 || echo "$(date) HPING3_TAMPERED" >> /var/log/hping3_monitor.log
' > /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh; chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh; echo '* * * * * root /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh' > /etc/cron.d/hping3_monitor; /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh; if ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2; then echo "LAN_REACHABLE:true"; else echo "LAN_REACHABLE:false"; fi; result=$(curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1); echo "$result"; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3; cat /root/hping3.sha256; tail -n 20 /var/log/hping3_monitor.log

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "Compromised_Host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_From_Compromised"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "Compromised_Host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end

args.command:
chattr +i /usr/sbin/hping3 || echo "chattr_failed:$?"
lsattr /usr/sbin/hping3
sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /root/hping3.sha256
cat > /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /tmp/hping3.current
cmp -s /tmp/hping3.current /root/hping3.sha256 || echo "$(date) HPING3_TAMPERED" >> /var/log/hping3_monitor.log
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh
echo '* * * * * root /usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh' > /etc/cron.d/hping3_monitor
/usr/local/bin/check_hping3.sh
if ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2; then echo "LAN_REACHABLE:true"; else echo "LAN_REACHABLE:false"; fi
result=$(curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1); echo "$result"
ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3; lsattr /usr/sbin/hping3; cat /root/hping3.sha256 || true; tail -n 20 /var/log/hping3_monitor.log || true

tool_calls.result:
chattr +i /usr/sbin/hping3 || echo "chattr_failled:$?"
